plugin.name: AutoReDualOffhand
plugin.author: Dunnaakr
plugin.purpose: Automatically re-duals your current offhand weapon after portal (WOOSH)
plugin.description:
Auto Re-Dual Offhand Plugin for Aardwolf
Type "autodual" to toggle ON/OFF (default ON). Only triggers when off-hand is removed + WOOSH appears.

trigger.name: CaptureOffhandStop
trigger.send:
Dim fullName, shortName, words
fullName = Trim("%2") If fullName = "" Then fullName = Trim("%1")
words = Split(fullName, " ") shortName = Trim(words(UBound(words)))
If shortName <> "" Then world.SetVariable "OffhandWeapon", shortName world.Note "Captured offhand: " & shortName End If

trigger.name: PortalWooshReDual
trigger.send:
Dim enabled, weapon
enabled = Trim(world.GetVariable("AutoDualEnabled")) If enabled = "on" Then weapon = Trim(world.GetVariable("OffhandWeapon")) If weapon <> "" Then world.DoAfter 2, "dual " & weapon world.Note "Re-dualing offhand in 2 seconds: " & weapon End If End If

alias.name: ToggleAutoDual
alias.send:
Dim enabled enabled = Trim(world.GetVariable("AutoDualEnabled"))
If enabled = "on" Then world.SetVariable "AutoDualEnabled", "off" world.Note "=== Auto Re-Dual OFF ===" Else world.SetVariable "AutoDualEnabled", "on" world.Note "=== Auto Re-Dual ON ===" End If
